steps.title: Identify the structural relationship
steps.content: The passage states that production quotas “conferred greater bargaining power” on employees. The underlined portion immediately shows what employees did with that power: demanded benefits, and employers complied. The connection is direct—the second demonstrates the first in action.

steps.title: Match to the function
steps.content: The underlined portion elaborates on the bargaining power claim by showing its actual outcome in labor negotiations. B misidentifies this as exemplifying a wartime economic trend, C wrongly treats it as an exception when it confirms the worker agency narrative, and D focuses on worker identities instead of their strategic actions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
